title: NullPointerException in UserAuthenticationService.authenticate()
description: Users are reporting login failures. The auth-service is throwing NullPointerException when validating user sessions. The error occurs after the session cache TTL expires. Approximately 150 users affected in the last hour. This started after the 2:00 AM maintenance window.

title: Memory usage exceeding threshold on notification-service
description: Container memory usage has been steadily climbing and is now at 3.5GB (87.5% of 4GB limit). The rate of increase is approximately 100MB per hour. No recent code deployments. WebSocket connection count is abnormally high at 15,000 (normal: 2,000). Suspect memory leak in connection handler.

title: TypeError in chart-renderer.js on Safari 17.x
description: New error cluster detected: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'transform') at ChartRenderer.drawPath (chart-renderer.js:245). Only affecting Safari 17.x on macOS Sonoma. Chrome and Firefox work fine. Error count: 342 unique users in the last 24 hours. The D3.js SVG transform API behaves differently in Safari 17.

title: Database connection pool exhaustion on user-service
description: HikariCP connection pool on user-service is at 100% utilization (20/20 connections). Pending connection requests queued: 45. Average connection hold time: 8.2 seconds (threshold: 2s). The slow query identified is UserRepository.findWithPermissions() which performs multiple JOINs. Affecting response times for all user-related API endpoints.

title: New API endpoint returning HTTP 500 on /api/v3/recommendations
description: The recently deployed /api/v3/recommendations endpoint is returning HTTP 500 errors for 15% of requests. The error is 'TypeError: Cannot read property map of undefined' when the ML model returns an empty prediction array. The endpoint was deployed yesterday as part of the recommendation engine v2 rollout. This is a NEW issue not seen before.
